title: Send Command to User app
description: Sends the specified command to the specified user application

command.description: The value for the key command must be set_req_usr_app

command_id.description: A unique ID that will be echoed back in the command response by the reader.

userapp.description: User application name. For REST, the application is identified by the appname path parameter; for MQTT, the application is identified by the userapp payload field.

command.description: Command object to send to the user application.

message.description: Message value to send to the user application.
